net_summary: The two pages have distinct designs and content, making it difficult to directly compare them as they appear to be different e-commerce platforms.

differences.what_changed: Layout and design of the top navigation bar
differences.before: Amazon.in has a dark gray top navigation bar with white text and a search bar on the right side.
differences.after: Flipkart has a white top navigation bar with a yellow logo and a search bar on the left side.
differences.ux_impact: Different design approach, no clear UX impact.

differences.what_changed: Position and design of the search bar
differences.before: Search bar is on the right side of the top navigation bar on Amazon.in.
differences.after: Search bar is on the left side of the top navigation bar on Flipkart.
differences.ux_impact: Different design approach, no clear UX impact.

differences.what_changed: Content and design of the hero section
differences.before: Amazon.in has a pink hero section with a title 'Bestselling kurtas Under ₹399' and a promotional offer.
differences.after: Flipkart has a white hero section with a 'FLAT 10% OFF' offer and product promotions.
differences.ux_impact: Different design approach, no clear UX impact.

differences.what_changed: Layout and content of product categories
differences.before: Amazon.in has a grid layout with various product categories like 'Appliances for your home' and 'Revamp your home in style'.
differences.after: Flipkart has a different layout with product promotions and a 'Grab or gone' section.
differences.ux_impact: Different design approach, no clear UX impact.

differences.what_changed: Presence and content of the footer
differences.before: Amazon.in footer is not visible in the provided screenshot.
differences.after: Flipkart footer is not visible in the provided screenshot.

differences.before: Amazon.in has a pink hero section and a dark gray top navigation bar.
differences.after: Flipkart has a white background and a yellow logo.
differences.ux_impact: Different design approach, no clear UX impact.

differences.before: Amazon.in has a layout focused on kurtas and home appliances.
differences.after: Flipkart has a layout focused on various product promotions and deals.
differences.ux_impact: Different design approach, no clear UX impact.
